images.prompt: A raw, ultra-realistic 8k photograph of a stunningly beautiful, young Japanese female model with a top-tier gravure idol aesthetic, captured in a high-end gym. She is wearing a form-fitting, glossy teal ski suit that unzips slightly to reveal a hint of cleavage, the smooth fabric hugging her slim waist and curvy hips. Standing in front of a large wall mirror, she leans casually against a vintage bicycle, her innocent gaze locking eyes with the lens. The scene is bathed in a bright, clear moonlight glow that eliminates heavy shadows, creating a cozy and intimate atmosphere. The background features blurred gym equipment, rendered with cinematic teal and orange color grading. Shot on Sony A7R IV, 85mm f/1.4 GM lens, depth of field, ray tracing, global illumination, visible pores, and flawless skin texture.8k photo, Large breasts, deep cleavage, ample cleavage, sexy photo, beautilful girl without makeup
